---
title: "Projects"
pagetitle: "Projects — Hugo Trad"
description: "The Sludge Audit Platform and the Sludge Methodology Guide."
lang: en
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/en/projects">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="fr" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/fr/projets">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ar" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/ar/projects">
---

```{=html}
<nav class="langswitch" aria-label="Language">
  <a href="../en/projects.html" class="is-active">EN</a>
  <a href="../fr/projets.html">FR</a>
  <a href="../ar/projects.html">AR</a>
</nav>

<main class="content content--inner">
  <header class="site-header">
    <a href="index.html" class="site-header__brand">Hugo Trad</a>
    <nav class="site-header__nav">
      <a href="research.html">Research</a>
      <a href="projects.html" class="is-active">Projects</a>
      <a href="teaching.html">Teaching</a>
      <a href="cv.html">CV</a>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <article class="inner">
    <h1 class="inner__title">Projects</h1>
    <p class="inner__lede">Two open-source artefacts that translate the research into something agencies and auditors can use.</p>

    <article class="project-card">
      <h2 class="project-card__title">Sludge Audit Platform <span class="badge-status">in development</span></h2>
      <p class="project-card__tagline">Two-sided platform for diagnosing and reforming administrative burden.</p>
      <p class="project-card__body">Citizens and employees report friction in plain language. An LLM layer categorises and aggregates the reports. Auditors get a structured pre-assessment surface and a redesign workflow grounded in cognitive evidence.</p>
      <p class="project-card__links">
        <a href="https://github.com/hdtrad/sludge-audit-tool">GitHub</a>
        <a href="#">Demo (private)</a>
      </p>
    </article>

    <article class="project-card">
      <h2 class="project-card__title">Sludge Methodology Guide <span class="badge-status">v1.0</span></h2>
      <p class="project-card__tagline">Practitioner reference for running structured audits.</p>
      <p class="project-card__body">Four stages, eight phases, decision trees, a worked example, five templates, fidelity rubrics. Companion to the platform; designed for national agencies and the OECD.</p>
      <p class="project-card__links">
        <a href="#">Read</a>
        <a href="#">PDF</a>
      </p>
    </article>
  </article>
</main>
```
